overall.description: A first-person exploration through an industrial outskirts area in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring a hazy golden hour atmosphere with orange smog. The camera moves from a road up a grassy embankment past power transmission towers and billboards, eventually reaching a highway lined with industrial storage tanks and infrastructure.

events.description: camera moves from asphalt road onto dirt and grass embankment

agents.ego_description: walking up a grassy slope away from the road, heading toward palm trees and industrial structures

entered.detail: gray concrete wall running alongside the road
large metal lattice electricity pylon with multiple cables
tall palm tree silhouetted against the hazy sky
large rectangular industrial structure visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an asphalt road beside a concrete retaining wall, then transitions onto a dirt embankment. The camera ascends a grassy slope with a large power transmission tower visible to the left and palm trees ahead, all bathed in warm golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown hillside with scattered palm trees

agents.ego_description: moving through tall grass on the hillside, approaching a large billboard

entered.detail: large commercial billboard with colorful advertising visible through the haze
metal fence running parallel to the highway below

segments.scene_description: Moving through dense tall grass on the hillside, the camera approaches palm trees while a large billboard becomes visible on the right. The power transmission tower looms closer on the left as the highway fence appears along the left edge of the frame.

agents.ego_description: walking parallel to the highway fence, passing the All Foods billboard

segments.scene_description: The camera travels along the highway edge with the guardrail now prominent on the left and the highway visible beyond it. The All Foods billboard grows larger on the right while the power transmission tower shifts to the right side of the frame.

events.description: camera passes directly beneath the metal framework of the transmission tower

agents.ego_description: moving through dense vegetation beneath the power tower, heading toward industrial buildings

entered.detail: large cylindrical industrial storage tanks visible in the distance
tall modern street lamp with illuminated fixture

segments.scene_description: Passing beneath the massive power transmission tower, the camera moves through dense vegetation as industrial storage tanks come into view ahead. The billboard passes out of view behind while street lights appear along the approaching industrial complex.

events.description: camera steps from grassy embankment onto paved highway surface

agents.ego_description: walking along the highway shoulder past industrial storage tanks and street lights

entered.detail: elevated highway bridge structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the grass onto the asphalt highway, now traveling along the industrial road. Storage tanks line the left side while the power tower recedes into the distance on the right, and a highway overpass becomes visible ahead through the hazy atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a roadside embankment up through wild vegetation and into a hazy industrial corridor. It begins on an asphalt road beside a concrete wall before ascending a grassy slope bathed in warm golden hour light, with a massive power transmission tower looming to the left. As the camera pushes through dense tall grass and past palm trees, a large billboard emerges on the right while a highway fence begins to line the left edge of the frame. The scene then shifts as the camera travels along the guardrail, passing beneath the towering transmission structure and moving through thick brush until industrial storage tanks and street lights appear ahead. Finally, the camera emerges from the greenery onto the asphalt highway, traveling past the storage tanks toward a distant overpass shrouded in orange smog.
